overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character with red hair exploring an alien coastal landscape with turquoise tidal pools and rocky cliffs under a pinkish overcast sky. The character walks through shallow water and across rocky terrain, eventually climbing to a cliff edge overlooking a misty chasm.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline with scattered alien vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the rocky terrain toward the turquoise water pools, scanning the alien landscape

entered.detail: wrecked red spacecraft or vehicle partially submerged in the rocky terrain
massive gray rock formation rising steeply on the left side
natural rock arch formation visible in the distant haze
shallow pool of bright turquoise water reflecting the pink sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a rocky alien shoreline with a crashed red vehicle visible to the left. The terrain is barren with sparse purple vegetation, leading toward turquoise tidal pools under an overcast pink sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow turquoise tidal pools at the base of the cliff

events.description: character steps from dry rocky ground into shallow turquoise water

agents.ego_description: wading through ankle-deep turquoise water along the base of the cliff

entered.detail: tall spiky alien flora with purple and white coloring growing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow turquoise water and continues along the cliff base. The crashed vehicle disappears from view behind as the character wades deeper into the tidal pools, with alien vegetation becoming prominent on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky plateau with interconnected turquoise pools

events.description: character turns slightly right to navigate between rock formations

agents.ego_description: navigating through shallow pools and rocky outcrops while heading toward higher ground

entered.detail: massive boulder formation creating a narrow passage

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the main cliff, the character navigates through a series of interconnected turquoise pools surrounded by rocky outcrops. The terrain becomes more uneven as the character approaches a steeper section.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep rocky cliff edge overlooking deep misty chasm

events.description: character begins ascending steep rocky slope toward cliff edge
character reaches cliff edge revealing misty chasm with turquoise water far below

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky cliff face and approaching the edge to look down into the chasm

entered.detail: deep canyon with mist rising from turquoise water at the bottom
rocky precipice where the ground drops away sharply

segments.scene_description: The character climbs up a steep rocky incline and reaches a cliff edge, revealing a dramatic misty chasm with turquoise water far below. The perspective shifts to show the vast drop-off and distant rock formations across the canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a barren alien shoreline that gradually ascends to a dramatic cliffside overlook. It begins with the character walking across a rocky coast past a crashed red vehicle and sparse purple vegetation under an overcast pink sky. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts into shallow turquoise tidal pools, leaving the wreckage behind while alien flora becomes more prominent along the cliff base. The camera then navigates through a series of interconnected pools and uneven rocky outcrops before turning toward a steep incline. Finally, the character climbs the rocky slope to reach a high ledge, revealing a vast, misty chasm with turquoise water and distant rock formations far below.
